name: Jing Yuan
desc: The Divine Foresight, one of the Seven Arbiter-Generals of the Xianzhou Alliance, leads the Cloud Knights of the Xianzhou Luofu.\nA student of the Luofu's previous Sword Champion, though not known for his martial prowess.

1.name: Slash, Seas Split
1.desc: When Lightning-Lord attacks, the DMG multiplier on enemies adjacent to the target enemy increases by an extra amount equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the DMG multiplier against the primary target enemy.

2.name: Swing, Skies Squashed
2.desc: After Lightning-Lord takes action, DMG dealt by Jing Yuan's Basic ATK, Skill, and Ultimate increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

3.name: Strike, Suns Subdued
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Spin, Stars Sieged
4.desc: For each hit performed by the Lightning-Lord when it takes action, Jing Yuan regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

5.name: Stride, Spoils Seized
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Sweep, Souls Slain
6.desc: Each hit performed by the Lightning-Lord when it takes action will make the target enemy Vulnerable.\nWhile Vulnerable, enemies receive <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> more DMG until the end of the Lightning-Lord's current turn, stacking up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s).

120401.name: Glistening Light
120401.desc: Jing Yuan deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of his ATK to one designated enemy.
120401.simple_desc: Deals minor Lightning DMG to one enemy.

120402.name: Rifting Zenith
120402.desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jing Yuan's ATK to all enemies and increases Lightning-Lord's Hits Per Action by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> for the next turn.
120402.simple_desc: Deals minor Lightning DMG to all enemies and <color=#f29e38ff>increases Lightning-Lord's Hits Per Action</color>.

120403.name: Lightbringer
120403.desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jing Yuan's ATK to all enemies and increases Lightning-Lord's Hits Per Action by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> for the next turn.
120403.simple_desc: Deals Lightning DMG to all enemies and <color=#f29e38ff>increases Lightning-Lord's Hits Per Action</color>.

120404.name: Prana Extirpated
120404.desc:
Summons "Lightning-Lord" at the start of the battle. "Lightning-Lord" has <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> base SPD and <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> base Hits Per Action. When the Lightning-Lord takes action, its hits are considered as <u>Follow-Up ATKs</u>, with each hit dealing Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jing Yuan's ATK to a random single enemy, and enemies adjacent to it also receive Lightning DMG equal to <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> of the DMG dealt to the primary target enemy.
The Lightning-Lord's Hits Per Action can reach a max of <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak>. Every time "Lightning-Lord's" Hits Per Action increases by 1, its SPD increases by <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>. After the "Lightning-Lord's" action ends, its SPD and Hits Per Action return to their base values.
When Jing Yuan is <u>knocked down</u>, the "Lightning-Lord" will disappear.
When Jing Yuan is affected by <u>Crowd Control debuff</u>, the "Lightning-Lord" is unable to take action.
120404.simple_desc: At the start of the battle, summons "Lightning-Lord." When "Lightning-Lord" takes action, launches <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> to <color=#f29e38ff>automatically</color> <color=#f29e38ff>deal minor Lightning DMG</color> to one random enemy and adjacent targets.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

10000007.name: Downed State
10000007.desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.

10000011.name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominance, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock, Happiness Puppet, Grudge Ablaze.

120406.name: Attack
120406.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

120407.name: Spiritus Invocation
120407.desc: After the Technique is used, the Lightning-Lord's Hits Per Action in the first turn increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> at the start of the next battle.
120407.simple_desc: After using Technique, for the next battle, <color=#f29e38ff>increases Lightning-Lord's Hits Per Action</color>.

1.point_desc: If the Lightning-Lord's Hits Per Action is greater or equal to <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> in the next turn, its CRIT DMG increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> for the next turn.
At the start of the battle, immediately regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.
After the Skill is used, the CRIT Rate increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
